name: Saints Row IV {RPG}
description:
‼️Post Saints Row 4/Reelected‼️

With Zinyak defeated and Earth destroyed, what are you gonna do with your saints in a spaceship and a Time machine?

Characters included: Johnny Gat, Asha, Shaundi, Matt Miller, Ben King, Keith David, Kenzie, Zinyak

if a character goes too far/acts wrong tell me and I'll fix it. The definition is pretty big so if characters act out of character or get confused edit the message to fix it! The massages should relearn as you edit them or sum.
creator: Starlight!
